summary: Iteration 33 - 8-Category Model & Schedule Split Testing Complete. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Homepage shows 'THE LUCKY 11' branding, UPCOMING tab shows 58 matches (all future dates), COMPLETED tab shows 12 matches (all past dates). Pre-match page displays 8 factor bars (Squad Strength, Current Form, Venue+Home, H2H, Toss Impact, Bowling Depth, Conditions, Momentum) - NO Matchups/Injuries factors. Match Info sidebar shows city and timeIST. Match News section shows newsdata.io articles. LiveMatch sidebar tabs are: Consult, Live API, Models, Odds, Squad, Players - NO 'Claude' tab.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/schedule returns 58 upcoming, 12 completed (correct split)
Backend: All upcoming matches have future dates
Backend: All completed matches have past dates
Backend: No future-dated matches in completed tab
Backend: POST /api/matches/ipl2026_015/pre-match-predict returns 8-category-v2 model
Backend: Prediction has exactly 8 factors (no matchups/injuries)
Backend: Playing XI has 11+11 players with confidence='squad-based'
Backend: Prediction includes form_data from DB
Backend: Prediction includes momentum data (last 2 matches)
Backend: GET /api/matches/ipl2026_013/news returns newsdata.io articles (count > 0)
Backend: GET /api/matches/ipl2026_013/state includes city and timeIST
Backend: GET /api/ returns version 4.1.0 with schedule and squads loaded
Frontend: Homepage shows 'THE LUCKY 11' branding
Frontend: UPCOMING tab shows 58 matches
Frontend: COMPLETED tab shows 12 matches
Frontend: Pre-match page shows 8 factor bars (not 10)
Frontend: Pre-match page does NOT show Consultant/Risk Tolerance section
Frontend: Pre-match page shows Match Info with city and timeIST
Frontend: Pre-match page shows Match News section
Frontend: LiveMatch sidebar tabs: Consult, Live API, Models, Odds, Squad, Players
Frontend: LiveMatch does NOT have 'Claude' tab in sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Schedule filtering correctly uses DATE as primary classifier - future dates always go to upcoming
8-category model correctly excludes matchups and injuries factors
Playing XI generation uses squad-based approach (no web scraping)
Form data correctly fetched from DB completed matches
News API (newsdata.io) working and returning relevant cricket articles
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule (70 matches from official PDF)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 complete. All features working as specified: 8-category model (no matchups/injuries), schedule split (58 upcoming/12 completed based on date), squad-based playing XI, form/momentum from DB, newsdata.io news, Match Info with city/timeIST. LiveMatch sidebar has 6 tabs (no Claude tab). Weather API (Open-Meteo) may return 502 temporarily but code is correct.

form_data.description: Form scores from DB completed matches

match_info.description: city and timeIST in Match Info sidebar

livematch_tabs.description: 6 tabs: Consult, Live API, Models, Odds, Squad, Players (no Claude)
